wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 3.0's Cliffhanger...ugh. Post by cd603 » Fri Jan 06, 2012 5:11 am So now that we can confirm that there will be 4 movies, how bad is 3.0 going to cliff hang??? Are we going to die waiting for Final? Will our mental state be left intact? Has Anno found a way to turn us into LCL!?!?! lol i guess we find out in Fall....

[]: Post by robersora » Fri Jan 06, 2012 5:50 am So now that we can confirm that there will be 4 movies, how bad is 3.0 going to cliff hang??? Are we going to die waiting for Final? Will our mental state be left intact? Has Anno found a way to turn us into LCL!?!?! lol i guess we find out in Fall....

[]: Post by cd603 » Fri Jan 06, 2012 5:54 am robersora wrote: I just called Anno. He told me, that the cliff-hanger will be so intense, that our brain will melt through our eyes. Srsly, somebody close this tread.

[]: Post by robersora » Fri Jan 06, 2012 6:31 am this thread will be useful in several months.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jan 06, 2012 12:25 pm People, people no need to be nasty. But yes, this thread is currently pointless, there's no need for it yet. Okay? Okay. If you want to speculate on what will happen in the film, we have tons of other threads for that.
